problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: The key to What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? is Monoclonal antibody blocking protein-protein interaction — specifically Monoclonal antibody blocking — which would help 1,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
